title: Replac'D
body:
Ever have to type something really long a bunch of times? Do you hate when someone misspells a word or name? Make the game autocorrect it for you!

With this mod, server owners and players alike can configure replacements of text into other text. For example, you can turn "WHT" into "Well hello, there." Simply install the mod, open the config file and add entries of the string to be replaced, followed by the string to replace it with!

When installed on the client, only your messages will be autocorrected. When installed on the server, all messages will be autocorrected *after* players' clients autocorrect their sent messages. (If it's installed on their client, that is.)

You can reload the config by entering the /reload command. This will reload the server's config if on a server, or the client's config if on a singleplayer world. But why would you use this in singleplayer? In order to reload the client's config while on a server, simply disconnect and reconnect.
